name: TANVI TANVI
pitch: A Molten Pour fluid solver simulation. Cursor velocity applies shear stress, liquefying and displacing coordinates via a Navier-Stokes grid feedback solver.

lifecycle.idle: Viscous liquid resting, minimal background ambient thermal currents
lifecycle.discovery: Cursor enters, applying initial shear forces to the local fluid grid
lifecycle.buildUp: Dragging creates turbulent flow lines and vortexes carrying image coordinates
lifecycle.peak: Rapid motion liquifies the canvas, spreading paint along velocity vectors
lifecycle.recovery: Paint flow slows down under damping friction, re-solidifying into resting state
